alternatives.name: Basic mechanical door alarm (no monitoring) — 45% share
alternatives.tradeoffs: No remote visibility; staff must physically patrol to detect unreported propping; no audit log; battery-free

alternatives.name: Wired panic bar / crash bar alarm — 20% share
alternatives.tradeoffs: Requires mains wiring conduit to each door; high retrofit cost in existing buildings; no wireless aggregation

alternatives.name: Alarmed exit hardware with IoT monitoring (Türwächter) — 25% share
alternatives.tradeoffs: Proprietary wireless protocol (C6); surface-mount profile visible (C5); battery dependency (C4); ~730 EUR per door (C7)

alternatives.name: Security guard patrols
alternatives.tradeoffs: Labor-intensive; coverage gaps at shift changes; no event log; scales linearly with door count; high recurring cost

alternatives.name: No dedicated exit monitoring (do nothing) — 10% share
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero installation burden; zero P1 burden; full compliance and brand audit risk; undetected misuse propagates
